context.projectOverview: Small confined change in src/fleet/: make FleetCoordinator.executeRounds return the ACTUAL executed round count (the terminating round; ==maxRounds on a full run, <maxRounds on early-stop) and surface it in BOTH .bober/fleet-synthesis.json (replacing the maxRounds-cap value) and .bober/fleet-report.json (a new OPTIONAL rounds field, blackboard runs only → no-blackboard report byte-identical). Closes the Phase-B known limitation. synthesis.ts is unchanged.

completedSprints.title: Bounded inter-agent blackboard + rounds loop + synthesis
completedSprints.summary: Built executeRounds (bounded rounds, scaffold-once, early-stop on no-new-findings) + runFleet blackboard branch + collect→fleet-synthesis.json. The known limitation THIS sprint fixes: runFleet hardcodes roundsRun=maxRounds (index.ts:181-184 with a bober: ceiling comment) because executeRounds returned only the final-round executions without a count.

relevantFiles: src/fleet/coordinator.ts (executeRounds :55-82 — change return to {executions, roundsRun}; the loop var r at :69 is the terminating round; DO NOT touch runChildRound/early-stop)

src/fleet/index.ts (runFleet blackboard branch :165-213 — destructure executeRounds, delete the bober: comment :181-183 + hardcoded roundsRun=maxRounds :184, pass rounds into reporter.build only when bb is set, collect already gets roundsRun)
src/fleet/reporter.ts (PortfolioReport :17-24 + build :39-62 — add optional rounds?: number via a guarded second arg so no-arg build is byte-identical)
src/fleet/synthesis.ts (collect :29-39 — NO change; already takes rounds:number)
src/fleet/coordinator.test.ts / index.test.ts / reporter.test.ts (test patterns; update executeRounds callers to destructure .executions)

principlesRef: .bober/principles.md — ESM .js imports, import type, node:fs/promises only, unicode section headers, conventional commits 'bober(sprint-1): ...'. HARD INVARIANTS: (a) no-blackboard fleet-report.json byte-identical — PortfolioReport.rounds OPTIONAL, build(outcomes) with no rounds arg omits the key, runFleet passes rounds only when bb!=null; (b) roundsRun = the round the loop terminated at (set roundsRun=r at top of each iteration so it's captured even when the break fires); (c) collect stays PURE (synthesis.ts unchanged); (d) never-throw exit-0 contract + early-stop logic untouched; (e) remove the obsolete bober: ceiling comment.
